title: drymocallis glandulosa subsp. nevadensis
intro: Drymocallis glandulosa subsp. nevadensis, also known as Nevada dryad root or Nevada dryad, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Drymocallis glandulosa subsp. nevadensis can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve for use in herbal remedies.
